ucs.title: [LLM] APT42 (Mandiant UNC788 / Charming Kitten overlap) credential phishing → MFA-bypass session token theft against journalists, NGOs and policy
ucs.description: Hunts APT42's signature 'rapport-build then phish' tradecraft: a benign-looking conversation from a Gmail/Outlook persona impersonating a journalist or think-tank, followed by a link to an attacker-controlled credential harvester (often hosted on legit infra like Google Sites, Dropbox, or freshly-registered look-alike domains) that captures both the password AND the session cookie to defeat MFA. Correlates the inbound spearphish, the URL click, and the immediate non-interactive AAD sign-in from a residential/VPN ASN that is the hallmark of session-cookie replay.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Email where Email.action=delivered (Email.src_user_domain IN ("gmail.com","outlook.com","protonmail.com","yahoo.com") OR match(Email.subject,"(?i)(interview|comment|op-?ed|policy|conference|invitation|sanction|iran|israel|gaza|nuclear)")) by Email.src_user Email.recipient Email.subject Email.message_id _time
| rename Email.* as *
| eval phish_window_start=_time, phish_window_end=_time+86400
| join recipient type=inner [
    | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Web where Web.action=allowed Web.url IN ("*sites.google.com*","*dropboxusercontent*","*onedrive.live.com*","*notion.site*","*googleusercontent*") OR match(Web.url,"(?i)(login|signin|verify|auth|secure|account|mfa|2fa)") by Web.user Web.url Web.dest _time
    | rename Web.user as recipient Web.url as click_url Web.dest as phish_dest _time as click_time
]
| where click_time >= phish_window_start AND click_time <= phish_window_end
| join recipient type=inner [
    | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.action=success Authentication.app="Office365" OR Authentication.signature_id="NonInteractiveUserSignIn" by Authentication.user Authentication.src Authentication.src_country Authentication.user_agent _time
    | rename Authentication.user as recipient Authentication.src as auth_src Authentication.src_country as auth_country Authentication.user_agent as auth_ua _time as auth_time
    | search auth_country!="US" AND auth_country!="GB" OR match(auth_ua,"(?i)(curl|python|powershell|go-http|axios)")
]
| where auth_time >= click_time AND auth_time <= (click_time+3600)
| table firstTime recipient src_user subject click_url phish_dest auth_src auth_country auth_ua
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)`
ucs.kql:
let phish = EmailEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where DeliveryAction == "Delivered"
| where SenderFromDomain in~ ("gmail.com","outlook.com","protonmail.com","yahoo.com","hotmail.com")
| where Subject matches regex @"(?i)(interview|comment|op-?ed|policy|conference|invitation|sanction|iran|israel|gaza|nuclear|think.?tank|atlantic|brookings|rusi)"
| project PhishTime=Timestamp, NetworkMessageId, SenderFromAddress, RecipientEmailAddress, Subject;
let click = UrlClickEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where ActionType == "ClickAllowed"
| where Url has_any ("sites.google.com","dropboxusercontent","onedrive.live.com","notion.site","firebaseapp.com","web.app","workers.dev")
   or Url matches regex @"(?i)(login|signin|verify|auth|secure|mfa|2fa|account)"
| project ClickTime=Timestamp, AccountUpn, Url, NetworkMessageId;
let susAuth = AADSignInEventsBeta
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where ErrorCode == 0
| where IsInteractive == false or SessionId != ""
| where Country !in ("US","GB","CA","AU","NZ","IE")
      or UserAgent has_any ("curl","python","PowerShell","Go-http","axios","okhttp")
| project AuthTime=Timestamp, AccountUpn, IPAddress, Country, UserAgent, SessionId, ApplicationId;
phish
| join kind=inner click on $left.RecipientEmailAddress == $right.AccountUpn
| where ClickTime between (PhishTime .. PhishTime + 24h)
| join kind=inner susAuth on AccountUpn
| where AuthTime between (ClickTime .. ClickTime + 1h)
| project PhishTime, ClickTime, AuthTime, RecipientEmailAddress, SenderFromAddress, Subject, Url, IPAddress, Country, UserAgent, SessionId
| sort by AuthTime desc
ucs.rationale: APT42 (Mandiant), aka Charming Kitten / TA453 (Proofpoint) / Mint Sandstorm (Microsoft) / ITG18 (IBM) — Iran's IRGC-IO subordinate cluster — is uniquely characterized by long-cadence rapport-building from free webmail personas impersonating journalists at outlets like The Atlantic, RUSI, or Foreign Policy, followed by a link to a credential page hosted on legitimate cloud infra (Google Sites, Drop

ucs.title: [LLM] APT42 NICECURL/TAMECAT staged execution: LNK→VBScript→PowerShell with browser credential exfil and cloud-storage egress
ucs.description: Hunts APT42's post-access malware family pair NICECURL (VBScript dropper masquerading as a benign installer/PDF) and TAMECAT (PowerShell backdoor). Detects the LNK-or-archive→wscript.exe→powershell.exe (encoded) chain, followed by access to Chrome/Edge Login Data SQLite and outbound HTTPS to attacker cloud-storage hops (Dropbox, OneDrive, GitHub raw, Google Drive) used for both C2 and exfil — a repeated APT42 pattern.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd values(Processes.process_path) as proc_path from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","explorer.exe") Processes.process_name="powershell.exe" (Processes.process="*-enc*" OR Processes.process="*FromBase64String*" OR Processes.process="*IEX*" OR Processes.process="*DownloadString*" OR Processes.process="*Invoke-WebRequest*") by host Processes.user Processes.process_guid Processes.parent_process_name
| rename Processes.* as *
| eval ps_window_start=firstTime-300, ps_window_end=firstTime+600
| join host type=inner [
    | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_path IN ("*\\Google\\Chrome\\User Data\\*\\Login Data","*\\Microsoft\\Edge\\User Data\\*\\Login Data","*\\Mozilla\\Firefox\\Profiles\\*\\logins.json","*\\Local State") Filesystem.process_name!="chrome.exe" Filesystem.process_name!="msedge.exe" Filesystem.process_name!="firefox.exe" by host Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.process_name _time
    | rename Filesystem.* as * _time as file_time
]
| where file_time >= ps_window_start AND file_time <= ps_window_end
| join host type=inner [
    | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Network_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest_port=443 (All_Traffic.dest IN ("*dropboxapi*","*content.dropboxapi*","*api.onedrive*","*graph.microsoft*","*raw.githubusercontent*","*api.telegram.org*","*googleapis.com*","*pastebin*")) by host All_Traffic.dest All_Traffic.process _time
    | rename All_Traffic.* as * _time as net_time
]
| where net_time >= ps_window_start AND net_time <= ps_window_end
| table firstTime host user parent_process_name cmdline file_path process_name dest
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)`
ucs.kql:
let psStage = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","explorer.exe")
| where FileName =~ "powershell.exe"
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("-enc","-EncodedCommand","FromBase64String","IEX","Invoke-Expression","DownloadString","Invoke-WebRequest","Net.WebClient")
| project PsTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, PsCmd=ProcessCommandLine, ParentCmd=InitiatingProcessCommandLine, PsPid=ProcessId;
let credAccess = DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where (FolderPath has_any (@"\Google\Chrome\User Data",@"\Microsoft\Edge\User Data",@"\Mozilla\Firefox\Profiles")
         and (FileName =~ "Login Data" or FileName =~ "Local State" or FileName =~ "logins.json" or FileName =~ "key4.db"))
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","MsMpEng.exe")
| project FileTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, FilePath=FolderPath, FileName, FileProc=InitiatingProcessFileName, FilePid=InitiatingProcessId;
let cloudEgress = DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where RemotePort == 443
| where RemoteUrl has_any ("dropboxapi.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.onedrive.com","graph.microsoft.com","raw.githubusercontent.com","api.telegram.org","googleapis.com","pastebin.com","transfer.sh")
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe")
| project NetTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, NetProc=InitiatingProcessFileName, NetPid=InitiatingProcessId;
psStage
| join kind=inner credAccess on DeviceId
| where FileTime between (PsTime - 5m .. PsTime + 10m)
| join kind=inner cloudEgress on DeviceId
| where NetTime between (PsTime - 5m .. PsTime + 10m)
| project PsTime, FileTime, NetTime, DeviceName, AccountName, ParentCmd, PsCmd, FilePath, FileName, RemoteUrl, RemoteIP
| sort by PsTime desc
ucs.rationale: Mandiant's APT42-charms report and Google TAG / Microsoft Mint Sandstorm reporting both flag the NICECURL VBScript dropper and TAMECAT PowerShell trojan as APT42 staples — typically delivered via a masquerading PDF/installer LNK that spawns wscript→powershell -enc, immediately reads Chrome/Edge Login Data and Local State (DPAPI key), and exfils via legitimate cloud-storage webservices (Dropbox API
